value.0: The drow are an evil subrace of elves, living deep underground in the dangerous Underdark.
Hammer of the Carn Dum Smith

The lowly wizard Huhhus discovered an efficient way to distill troll flesh into a regenerative potion, but few people were willing to drink the vile liquid and it was considered a failure. Decades later, one of his students built upon these foundations to create a regenerative ring fueled by bits of troll ichor and brains. This external use caused far less nausea, and the invention met with success.
The drow are an evil subrace of elves, living deep underground in the dangerous Underdark.
Hammer of the Carn Dum Smith
This Talisman of Paladin was only awarded to those soldiers of light who reached the highest order of Avatar.
A Glowing Talisman with a Silver symbol of Paladine.

This horrible smelling suit of plate armor is of obvious orcish design.  It offers good protection against all physical attacks though movement is difficult and stealth is impossible.  Due to the weight and size, smaller races will not be able to fit in this armor.
A suit of heavy plate armor.
A suit of armor typical of tribal orcs, it offers decent protection but smells quite foul.
Suits of hardened leather are created by boiling the leather in water, as the leather cools it shrinks and hardens.  Hardened leather armor is often studded for added protection.
A suit of hardened leather armor.
Full suits of chainmail offer excellent protection against slashing weapons but are susceptible to crushing damage.  Though very flexible, movement will cause some noise.
This blade is a weapon of a servant of Sauron. The dark lord has been up to something, if he places these creature with such weapons in wait for wood-be heroes.
A wicked looking blade of Ethereal quality.
This blade is a weapon of a servant of Sauron. The dark lord has been up to something, if he places these creature with such weapons in wait for would-be heroes.
A wicked looking blade of Ethereal quality.
A Morgul blade is a weapon of the Ringwraiths. To be feared always.

This magic bow has a bonus to attack. As well, it allows the wielder to add part of his strength modifier to the damage dealt.
